mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, gender, status, role, merchant_name, contact_name, contact_phone, business_scope, merchant_intro, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{gender}, #{status}, #{role}, #{merchantName}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{businessScope}, #{merchantIntro}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET role = #{role}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND role != 1

UPDATE user SET merchant_name = #{merchantName}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, business_scope = #{businessScope}, merchant_intro = #{merchantIntro}, merchant_apply_status = 1, merchant_apply_reject_reason = NULL, merchant_apply_time = NOW(), merchant_review_time = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user
merchant_apply_status IN (1, 2, 3)
AND merchant_apply_status = #{status}
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR merchant_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR contact_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR contact_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET role = 2, merchant_apply_status = 2, merchant_apply_reject_reason = NULL, merchant_review_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND merchant_apply_status = 1
UPDATE user SET role = 0, merchant_apply_status = 3, merchant_apply_reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, merchant_review_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND merchant_apply_status = 1

UPDATE user SET merchant_name = NULL, contact_name = NULL, contact_phone = NULL, business_scope = NULL, merchant_intro = NULL, merchant_apply_status = 0, merchant_apply_reject_reason = NULL, merchant_apply_time = NULL, merchant_review_time = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND merchant_apply_status IN (1, 3)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user WHERE id = #{id} AND role != 1
